svg.title: Parallel Projection and Step Proportion — A Primer of Quaternions, Chapter 1
svg.desc: Two diagrams: (1) projecting a sum of steps AB+BC onto a line via parallel rays, showing the projection of the sum equals the sum of projections; (2) step proportion illustrating linear scaling preserved under parallel projection.
svg.text: Parallel projection — projection of a sum

g.text: Hathaway's theorem: proj(s₁ + s₂ + … + sₙ) = proj(s₁) + proj(s₂) + … + proj(sₙ)

svg.text: Step proportion — linear scaling under projection
proj(k · s) = k · proj(s) — scaling commutes with projection

g.text: a mechanical device that multiplies steps geometrically via parallel linkage
